text:
ふーん、なかなかいい感じの
場所じゃない？
でも、空気が張りつめてる感じだね。

さすが黒の民の本拠地ってとこかな？
ま、適度な緊張感はいいものだよね！

それじゃ、エネミーの不意打ちに
気をつけな

Hmmm, this place is pretty nice...
but the atmosphere feels kinda tense.

I guess we should've expected as much from
he Nightfaller base. Well, a little bit of
tension never hurt anyone!

Okay, let's get moving before the enemy
notices us! Carefully, though.
